_meta.purpose: Which phone/edge sensor contributes what to EMERGENCY TRIAGE (fire, chemical exposure, blast, fall/man-down, presence, comms-loss), with honest confidence and environment caveats. No camera. Camera-free.
_meta.barometer_fire_note: A barometer cannot hear voices, but for FIRE/BLAST the physics differs: open-air fire pressure dissipates (low confidence), an ENCLOSED station/tent fire raises temperature+pressure (medium), and an EXPLOSION/blast overpressure is a large in-band transient the barometer CAN catch (high). Most barometer ICs also expose a temperature reading -> ambient heat rise near a fire is detectable as temp.

amazon_rainforest: dense canopy -> GPS poor (lean on barometer/dead-reckoning)
foliage + bodies -> UWB/BLE/cell attenuated -> often voice-only or no-signal
loud bio-acoustic background -> acoustic detection harder
desert_field_station: extreme heat -> sensor thermal DRIFT + phone overheating/shutdown risk
big day/night temp swings -> barometer/temp drift
sparse comms -> plan for no-signal relay

emergency.use: other voices (count), cries for help, equipment running

matrix.rainforest: humidity OK; use for altitude when GPS is canopy-blocked

emergency.use: geotag the incident for rescue relay

matrix.rainforest: canopy degrades -> pair with barometer + last-known

emergency.use: live wiring, motors, transmitting radio nearby
range/bearing to TAGGED responders or victims
detect a body/obstacle shape at range (no RGB)
chest micro-motion -> BREATHING RATE (even heartbeat) of an unresponsive worker, NO contact and NO camera
detect motion/people through SMOKE, darkness, dust, thin walls (RF penetrates where optics fail)
Doppler motion then sudden stillness = collapse
hands-free control without touching the screen

matrix.rainforest: RF works in low light/rain; dense foliage attenuates
matrix.channel: external mmWave module or radar-capable device; UWB approximates
matrix.note: Few phones have true radar; UWB gives a coarse radar-like signal. The killer triage use is contactless breathing detection on a downed worker.

emergency.use: crude movement or phone covered (in pocket/under debris)
